title: OREGON IMMUNIZATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON IMMUNIZATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technical assistance to vaccine providers and offers education and quality improvement for providers. Promotes immunizations for all age groups. Provides information and answers questions about immunizations for the public, as well as school requirements and the vaccine exemption process. Each year the program reminds parents of the state law that requires that all children in public and private schools, preschools, Head Start and certified child care facilities have up-to-date immunizations, or have a religious exemption. Parents or guardians receive a letter in late January or early February if their child's immunization record shows that the child has not received the required vaccinations. Children will not be able to attend school or child care starting on a certain date in February, Exclusion Day, if their records on file show missing immunizations. Parents must make sure that their child's vaccinations are brought up to date and submit updated documentation to the school. Oregon allows medical and religious exemptions to the vaccination requirements. For medical exemption, see doctor or county health department. For religious exemption, parent must sign religious exemption section of Certificate of Immunization Status, as well as see a doctor about or watch videos on the benefits of vaccinations. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (800) 980-9431 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free Main phone (800) 980-9431 Oregon Immunization Program Help Desk Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
